releaseNotes:
- The Library can now import existing unregistered Lunaverse projects alongside starting from scratch and importing a novel
- Legacy v0.5.1 projects are normalized into the 1.0 book layout, with active scripts converted, validated, and compiled before shelf registration
- Project migration is copy-first and transactional: failures roll back cleanly, and a changed source folder is preserved instead of deleted
releaseNotesZh:
- 书架新增“迁入项目”，与“从零新建”和“导入小说”并列，可直接收纳其它目录中未登记的 Lunaverse 项目
- 旧版 v0.5.1 项目会自动整理为 1.0 书籍目录，并在登记到书架前完成活动脚本转换、校验与编译
- 项目迁移采用先复制后提交的事务流程：失败会完整回滚，源目录若在迁移期间发生变化则会保留而不删除
